summary: Iteration 83 - Comprehensive testing of report features including \1 artifact stripping, prompt instruction stripping, we/us/our language sanitization, comparison table, disclaimer footer, table-layout:fixed CSS, Lock icon, and BarristerView header. All 34 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with white background and professional styling.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend _strip_report_placeholders function (lines 3420-3507) correctly strips \1 artifacts (line 3435-3436), prompt instructions (lines 3437-3442), and we/us/our language (lines 3444-3506)
Frontend ReportView.jsx cleanAIContent function (lines 110-266) strips \1 artifacts (lines 118-120), prompt instructions (lines 124-136), and we/us/our language (lines 161-230)
Frontend BarristerView.jsx cleanAIContent function (lines 372-516) strips \1 artifacts (lines 379-381), prompt instructions (lines 407-413), and we/us/our language (lines 416-480)
Frontend ReportView.jsx has comparison table (lines 862-922) with FREE/$150/$200 columns and checkmarks
Frontend ReportView.jsx has disclaimer footer (lines 924-941) with 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' and 'Created and Designed by Deb King'
Frontend ReportView.jsx print preview (lines 454-644) includes comparison table, disclaimer, and table-layout:fixed CSS
Frontend BarristerView.jsx has disclaimer (lines 1862-1880) with 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' and 'Created and Designed by Deb King'
Frontend BarristerView.jsx header shows 'BARRISTER BRIEF' (line 1120), print preview shows 'CONFIDENTIAL BARRISTER BRIEF' (line 215)
Frontend BarristerView.jsx header shows grounds count (line 1187) and documents count (line 1191)
Frontend ReportsSection.jsx imports Lock icon (line 12) and uses it on locked Barrister View button (line 547)
Frontend index.css has table-layout:fixed in print media for legal-report tables (line 636)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 21 features from test request verified: 1) Backend _strip_report_placeholders strips \1 artifacts, 2) Backend _strip_report_placeholders strips prompt instruction text, 3) Backend _strip_report_placeholders strips we/us/our language, 4) Backend report prompts contain MATERIAL COUNTS section, 5) Frontend ReportView cleanAIContent strips \1 artifacts, 6) Frontend ReportView cleanAIContent strips prompt instruction text, 7) Frontend ReportView cleanAIContent strips we/us/our language, 8) Frontend ReportView has comparison table with Free/$150/$200 columns, 9) Frontend ReportView has bold 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' disclaimer with 'Created and Designed by Deb King', 10) Frontend ReportView print preview has table-layout:fixed CSS, 11) Frontend ReportView print preview includes comparison table, 12) Frontend ReportView print preview includes disclaimer and 'Created and Designed by Deb King', 13) Frontend BarristerView cleanAIContent strips we/us/our language, 14) Frontend BarristerView cleanAIContent strips \1 artifacts, 15) Frontend BarristerView has bold disclaimer and 'Created and Designed by Deb King', 16) Frontend BarristerView print preview has professional layout with styled header, 17) Frontend BarristerView header shows 'BARRISTER BRIEF' not 'CONFIDENTIAL LEGAL BRIEF', 18) Frontend BarristerView header shows grounds count and documents count, 19) Frontend ReportsSection shows Lock icon on locked Barrister View button, 20) Frontend index.css print media has table-layout:fixed for legal-report tables, 21) Backend health check works.
